test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Business logic never depends on provider-specific response objects.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every production prompt and route has an approved version.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every output is schema-validated before use.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: High-impact outputs require human review.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Retrieval is tenant- and permission-scoped.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Fallback never converts a failed inference into a successful fact.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Model, prompt, sources, cost, latency, and safety metadata are traceable.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Tenant data is not used for general model training without authorization.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
